title: Infosys Launches Advanced AI, Cybersecurity, and Space Technology Center at Hubballi
detailed_summary: Infosys announced the launch of its Center for Advanced AI, Cybersecurity, and Space Technology at its Hubballi Development Center in Karnataka on August 06, 2025. The center is part of Infosys Living Labs, a network of over 12 established centers globally, and positions Hubballi as a technology hub for advanced digital solutions including AI, cloud computing, cybersecurity, engineering services, SAP, and space technology. The center will serve global clients across manufacturing, financial services, retail, and healthcare. Infosys also reported that over 1,000 employees work out of the Hubballi Development Center and cited ties with IIIT Dharwad and KLE Tech.
